title: equisetum × lapponicum
intro: Equisetum × lapponicum, also known as the boreal horsetail or Scandinavian jointed horsetail, is a hybrid plant species within the Equisetum genus. It has been utilized in traditional medicine due to its rich source of silica, flavonoids, and other compounds that possess medicinal properties. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, including its potential to aid in the treatment of kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and as an anti-inflammatory agent. Equisetum × lapponicum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal preparation methods.
